name: Fruit Juice Combo Malts
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine fruit juice (such as pineapple-orange-banana) in a blender or food processor with the vanilla malted milk powder.
2. Blend at medium speed, stopping to scrape the sides frequently until the malted milk powder is fully dissolved.
3. Add the vanilla ice cream and continue blending, stopping to scrape the sides frequently until smooth.
4. Serve immediately. Yield: 5 servings.
